ligature_substitutions.$comment: Typeface fi/fl/ff ligature confusions cleanup flags (D3). Required-and-explicit (BR-004): a profile without them declares [], never omits the key.

noise_line_patterns.$comment: Full-line OCR-decoration regexes cleanup drops (a line matching ANY of them is noise). The committed singular noise_line_pattern folded into this list at M4b, joined by the separator + Disp.-furniture patterns (cleanup.py is_noise_line :234/:248/:251). Per-pattern flags via inline groups, e.g. (?i).

page_marker_line_pattern.$comment: The compound page-marker noise class (cleanup.py is_noise_line :241); the len/real-word/has-digit guard around it stays in code.

char_substitutions.$comment: [regex, replacement] confusions whose REPLACEMENT is typeface/language opinion (e.g. £→E, a Bodoni misread of a capital E). Distinct from inline_page_marker_patterns, which delete noise (neutral space).

inline_page_marker_patterns.$comment: Mid-text page-marker artifact regexes cleanup removes (cleanup.py :601-603); each match is replaced by a neutral space in code.
